title: triticum aestivum subsp. dicoccum
intro: Triticum aestivum subsp. dicoccum, also known as einkorn, is an ancient subspecies of wheat that is characterized by its small seeds and single grain per ear. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of einkorn include improved digestion, reduced risk of chronic diseases, and potential anti-aging effects due to its high antioxidant content. Einkorn can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tablets, or as a food ingredient in baked goods, cereals, and other recipes.
